task_completion.description: Navigate to the Address Book or Add New Entry form in LibreHealth EHR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreHealth EHR interface is visible, showing the Address Book section or a form to add a new person/contact.

task_completion.description: Enter the physician's name and categorize them correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The First Name field contains 'Elena', the Last Name field contains 'Rodriguez', and a Type/Category dropdown or field is set to 'Referring Physician' (or similar referring provider option).

task_completion.description: Enter the organization and specialty details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Organization field contains 'City General Hospital - Cardiology Department' (or at least 'City General Hospital') and the Specialty field contains 'Cardiology'.

task_completion.description: Enter the phone, fax, and email information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Phone field contains '(555) 482-7100' or '5554827100', the Fax field contains '(555) 482-7101' or '5554827101', and the Email field contains 'e.rodriguez@citygeneral.example.org'.
The Address/Street field contains '450 Medical Center Drive' (or '450 Medical Center'), City is 'Springfield', State is 'MA', and Zip/Postal Code is '01103'.

task_completion.description: Save the new address book entry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the entry was saved, the saved contact card for Elena Rodriguez is displayed, or Elena Rodriguez appears in the Address Book list view.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the LibreHealth EHR graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the web browser and LibreHealth EHR interface being used, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the details into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data is entered into the actual LibreHealth EHR form fields, not a notepad, text editor, or blank browser page.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved the form rather than just filling it out.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots show a post-save state (like a success banner, a read-only view of the contact, or the address book list) rather than just a filled-out, unsaved form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Name: Elena Rodriguez. Organization: City General Hospital - Cardiology Department (accept 'City General Hospital'). Specialty: Cardiology. Phone: 5554827100 or (555) 482-7100. Fax: 5554827101 or (555) 482-7101. Email: e.rodriguez@citygeneral.example.org. Address: 450 Medical Center Drive (accept '450 Medical Center'), Springfield, MA 01103. Category/Type: Referring Physician. Verify these specific values are entered into the LibreHealth EHR Address Book form and successfully saved.
